---
title: "Publications"
jupyter: python3
execute:
  freeze: true
---

:::{.publications}

Below is a full list of my peer-reviewed publications and preprints, including links to open PDFs, associated datasets, code, and software where applicable.

```{python}
#| output: true
#| echo: false

import dominate.tags as tags
from parse_publications import make_pub, KEYS_BY_YEAR
from IPython.display import HTML

elements = []
for year in sorted(KEYS_BY_YEAR.keys(), reverse=True):
    keys = KEYS_BY_YEAR[year]
    elements.append(tags.h2(year))
    ul = tags.ul()
    for key in keys:
        ul += tags.li(make_pub(key))
    elements.append(ul)

html = "\n".join([e.render() for e in elements])
HTML(html)
```

:::
